name: abstractive_train_test_tasks_29
description: Seeded random train/test split over the 29 abstractive tasks. The 20 train tasks are used to fit PCA bases; the 9 test tasks are held out for projection-only analysis.
selection: Random shuffle of the sorted abstractive task list using Python random.Random(seed).
split_method: sorted task names shuffled with Python random.Random(seed=123); first 20 train, remaining 9 test
